examples: The land is bountiful and no one starves.
State aid is less bountiful than it was before.
It would be an egregious error to equate the monopolistic producer with bountiful expenditures on research.
"It was kind of a different challenge, " said finalist Vismaya Kharkar, 14, of Bountiful, Utah.
Carrie Watts in Horton Foote's "The Trip to Bountiful" may tug at Tony's heartstrings.
